description: A slick chest rig with a lot of capacity of MOLLE capacity.  It features six pockets for STANAG magazines, an admin pouch, and a pouch for a hydration bladder.

variants.description: A slick and comfortable chest rig with a large amount of space for stuff, both in PALS webbing and in embedded pockets.  It features six pockets for STANAG magazines, a tall admin pouch hidden inside the bib, and a pouch for a 3L hydration bladder on the back.  Additionally, there are two large MOLLE areas on the front, a small space on the bib, a tall one on the back, and a very-small one on each shoulder strap.  <variant:multicam>
